Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Robert Garcia, Esq. appearing for Appellant, Raymond Quinteno; Michael Raysor appearing for Respondent Pablo Centeno.
Counsel present their respective cases with direct examination and cross-examination, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
